name: A.L. Sahgal
description: Husband of Man Mohini Zutshi.

name: Ajit Hutheesing
description: Younger son of Krishna and G. P. Hutheesing.

name: Anand Kumar Nehru
description: Son of Uma and Shamlal Nehru.

name: Ashok Mehta
description: Son of Nanalal Mehta, married Chandralekha Pandit in 1949. A Member of Indian Foreign Service. He was Ambassador to Mexico, 1974-79.

name: Avtar Krishna Dar
description: Husband of Rita Pandit. Joined Indian Foreign Service, 1947. He was Joint Secretary in Ministry of External Affairs in 1965.

name: Balwant Kumar Nehru
description: Son of Rameshwari and Brijlal Nehru. He was an engineer and business executive and served as Director-General of All India Management Association, 1972-74. He was Secretary of Jawaharlal Nehru Memorial Fund and Vice-Chairman of the Executive Council of Nehru Memorial Museum and Library Society, 1982-1995.

name: Bansi Dhar Nehru
description: Eldest brother of Motilal Nehru. Joined government service and rose to the position of subordinate Judge.

name: Biharilal Nehru
description: Son of Nandrani and Nandlal Nehru.

name: Bishen Rani Takru
description: Wife of Maharaj Bahadur Takru.

name: Braj Kumar Nehru
description: Son of Rameshwari and Brijlal Nehru. Entered I.C.S. in 1934. He was Ambassador to U.S.A., 1961-68. He was the Governor of Assam and Nagaland, 1968-73 and Governor of Jammu and Kashmir, 1981-84.

name: Brijlal Nehru
description: Son of Nandrani and Nandlal Nehru. He served in the Indian Finance Department.

name: Chandra Kumari Handoo
description: Daughter of Lado Rani and Ladli Prasad Zutshi.

name: Chandralekha Mehta
description: Eldest daughter of Vijaya Lakshmi and Ranjit Sitaram Pandit. She was imprisoned during the Quit India movement, 1942. She worked for the National Herald for sometime.

name: Dr. Jalil Ashgar
description: Husband of Janak Kumari.

name: Dwarka Nath Takru
description: Husband of Maharani Nehru.

name: Feroze Gandhi
description: Married Indira Nehru, 1942. Managing Director of Associated Journals Ltd. and publisher, National Herald. He was Member of Provisional Parliament, 1950-52, and Member of Lok Sabha, 1952-60.

name: Feroze Varun Gandhi
description: Son of Maneka and Sanjay Gandhi. Member of Lok Sabha since 2009.

name: G.P. Hutheesing
description: Known in the family as Raja, married Krishna Nehru, 1933. He was Member of the Socialist Party and Planning Advisor to the Ministry of Rehabilitation, 1947.

name: Ganga Dhar Nehru
description: Father of Motilal Nehru. He was police officer in Delhi, from where he fled to Agra along with his family in 1857.

name: Gautam Sahgal
description: Husband of Nayantara.

name: Harsha Hutheesing
description: Elder son of Krishna and G. P. Hutheesing.

name: Indira Gandhi
description: Daughter of Kamala and Jawaharlal Nehru. Married Feroze Gandhi in 1942. She was the Prime Minister of India, 1966-77 and 1980-84.

name: Indrani alias Jeorani
description: Mother of Motilal Nehru.

name: Janak Kumari Ashgar
description: Daughter of Lado Rani and Ladli Prasad Zutshi. She was an educationist, nationalist and a social worker.

name: Jawaharlal Nehru
description: Son of Swarup Rani and Motilal Nehru. He was the President of Indian National Congress, 1929, 1936, 1946 and 1951-54. He was the First Prime Minister of independent India, 1947-64.

name: Kalavati Madan
description: Daughter of Tej Wanti and Biharilal Nehru, married to Pt. Triloki Nath Madan.

name: Kamala Kaul
description: Daughter of Rajpati and Jawaharmul Kaul. Married Jawaharlal Nehru, 1916. She participated in the civil disobedience movement and was imprisoned, January 1931.

name: Kamala Nehru
description: Wife of Mohanlal Nehru.

name: Kishenlal Nehru
description: Son of Nandrani and Nandlal Nehru. He was Member of Indian Legislative Assembly, 1923-26. He served as Medical Superintendent, King George’s Medical College, Lucknow, 1936-40.

name: Krishna Handoo
description: Married Chandra Kumari, 1927.

name: Krishna Hutheesing
description: Youngest daughter of Swarup Rani and Motilal Nehru. Married G.P. Hutheesing. She was a writer.

name: Kunwar Bahadur Nehru
description: Son of Bansi Dhar Nehru.

name: Ladli Prasad Zutshi
description: Son of Patrani and Lalji Prasad Zutshi. Married Lado Rani in 1897. He was a lawyer and Resident Trustee of Kamala Nehru Hospital, Allahabad.

name: Lado Rani Zutshi
description: Wife of Ladli Prasad Zutshi. Founded Women’s Conference in Allahabad. She was associated with Congress in Punjab and participated in the non-cooperation movement and civil disobedience movement.

name: Lalji Prasad Zutshi
description: Husband of Patrani, sister of Motilal Nehru.

name: Lilavati Gurtu
description: Daughter of Tej Wanti and Biharilal Nehru.

name: Maharaj Bahadur Takru
description: Son of Maharani and Dwarka Nath Takru.

name: Maharani Takru
description: Sister of Motilal Nehru.

name: Man Mohini Sahgal
description: Daughter of Lado Rani and Ladli Prasad Zutshi. She was political and social worker.

name: Maneka Gandhi
description: Daughter of Amardeep Kaur and Tarlochan Singh Anand. She married Sanjay Gandhi, 1974. Elected Member of Lok Sabha, 1989-1991 and since 1996 till date. She is Union Cabinet Minister, Women and Child Development since May 2014.

name: Manoharlal Nehru
description: Son of Tej Wanti and Biharilal Nehru.

name: Mohanlal Nehru
description: Son of Nandrani and Nandlal Nehru. He was Manager of Independent.

name: Motilal Nehru
description: Son of Indrani and Ganga Dhar Nehru. An eminent lawyer and Congress leader and Member of U.P. Legislative Council, 1909-19. He founded Swaraj Party along with C.R. Das in 1922 and was Member of Indian Legislative Assembly, 1923-30. He was Chairman of All Parties Conference Committee, 1928.

name: Nandlal Nehru
description: Brother of Motilal Nehru. He was lawyer of Allahabad High Court and Diwan of Khetri State in Rajputana.

name: Nandrani Nehru
description: Wife of Nandlal Nehru.

name: Nayantara Sahgal
description: Younger daughter of Vijaya Lakshmi and Ranjit Sitaram Pandit. She is a distinguished author, novelist and political journalist. She served on the Jury of the Commonwealth Writers Prize in 1990 and 1991 and elected fellow of the American Academy of Arts and Sciences, 1990.

name: Padma Nehru
description: Daughter of Shivrajvati and Kishenlal Nehru.

name: Patrani Zutshi
description: Sister of Motilal Nehru.

name: Priyanka Gandhi
description: Daughter of Sonia and Rajiv Gandhi, married Robert Vadra, 1997.

name: Rahul Gandhi
description: Son of Sonia and Rajiv Gandhi. Member of Lok Sabha since 2004 and Vice-President of Indian National Congress since 2013.

name: Raj Bahadur Nehru
description: Son of Bansi Dhar Nehru.

name: Raj Dulari Nehru
description: Daughter of Kailash Prasad Kitchlew of Agra. Wife of Shri Shridhara Nehru.

name: Rajan Nehru
description: Wife of Ratan Kumar Nehru. Political and social worker and member of Indian National Congress for 30 years. She was founder-member, Indian Council of Child Welfare, and Bharat Sewak Samaj. Led Indian delegation to U.N. Human Rights Commission, 1973-74.

name: Rajiv Gandhi
description: Elder son of Indira and Feroze Gandhi. He was member of Lok Sabha, 1981–1991. President of Indian National Congress, 1985–1991 and the Prime Minister of India, 1984-1989.

name: Rameshwari Nehru
description: Wife of Brijlal Nehru. A prominent social worker. She was the President of Women’s Committee of the Indian League, 1931-33 and one of the founders of All-India Women’s Conference.

name: Ranjit Sitaram Pandit
description: Married Vijaya Lakshmi in 1921. He was a barrister, gave up practice to participate in the national movement and suffered imprisonment.

name: Ratan Kumar Nehru
description: Son of Kamala and Mohanlal Nehru. Joined I.C.S. in 1925. He was Ambassador to Sweden, Denmark and Finland, 1949-52. He served as Foreign Secretary, Government of India, 1952-55, and Secretary-General, Ministry of External Affairs, 1960-63.

name: Rita Dar
description: Youngest daughter of Vijaya Lakshmi and Ranjit Sitaram Pandit. She worked with Red Cross.

name: Roop Nehru
description: Daughter of Kamala and Mohanlal Nehru, married to Hariharnath Wanchu.

name: S.P. Chopra
description: Husband of Shyama Mohini Zutshi.

name: Sanjay Gandhi
description: Younger son of Indira and Feroze Gandhi. He was Member of Lok Sabha, 1980.

name: Sarup Kumari/ Vijaya Lakshmi Pandit
description: Elder daughter of Swarup Rani and Motilal Nehru. Diplomat and politician, she served as Ambassador to Soviet Union, 1947-49, and U.S.A., 1949-52. She was Member of Lok Sabha, 1952-54, 1964-68, and the first woman President of U.N. General Assembly, 1953-54.

name: Sarup Nehru
description: Wife of Balwant Kumar Nehru.

name: Shamlal Nehru
description: Son of Nandrani and Nandlal Nehru. He took part in the non-cooperation movement and was jailed. He started The Democrat, a weekly newspaper from Allahabad in 1921.

name: Shivrajvati Nehru
description: Wife of Kishenlal Nehru. A member of U.P.P.C.C., suffered imprisonment during the national movement. She was Member of Lok Sabha, 1955-56, and U.P. Legislative Council, 1957-78.

name: Shobha Nehru
description: Wife of Braj Kumar Nehru. Also known as Fory in the family.

name: Shri Shridhara Nehru
description: Son of Bansi Dhar Nehru. Entered I.C.S., 1912 and was Member of Imperial Council of Agricultural Research in 1933 and Honorary President, International Union of Lawyers, Paris and Brussels.

name: Shyam Kumari Khan
description: Daughter of Uma and Shamlal Nehru, married to Abdul Jamil Khan. She became first woman Secretary, Vice-President and President, Allahabad University Union, 1924-28. She was member of Rajya Sabha, 1963-68.

name: Shyama Mohini Zutshi
description: Younger daughter of Lado Rani and Ladli Prasad Zutshi.

name: Sonia Maino
description: Daughter of Paola Predebon and Stefano Maino, married Rajiv Gandhi in 1968. She is the President of Indian National Congress, since March 1998 and Member of Lok Sabha since 1999. She is also Chairperson of Jawaharlal Nehru Memorial Fund, United Progressive Alliance since 2004, Rajiv Gandhi Foundation and National Advisory Council, 2004-2006.

name: Swarup Rani Nehru
description: Wife of Motilal Nehru. She also participated in the civil disobedience movement, 1930-32.

name: Tejwanti Nehru
description: Wife of Biharilal Nehru.

name: Uma Nehru
description: Wife of Shamlal Nehru. She was Member of Lok Sabha, 1952-62.

name: Vidya Nehru
description: Daughter of Shivrajvati and Kishenlal Nehru. Vishnu Dutt: Husband of Vidya Nehru.

name: Vishnu Dutt
description: Husband of Vidya Nehru.
